_comment_schema: Operator Cycle config. See CYCLE-CONTRACT.md § 5 and § 10 for authoritative field definitions.
_comment_domain_rotation: The 7 canonical domains. Cycle rotates through these; anti-decay switches domain after 3 same-domain or 3-null runs.
_comment_project_allowlist: Explicit list of project root paths the loop may write into via /cycle-evolve and /schedule-task. Ships empty — the operator populates this. Adding entries requires editing this file directly (it is on the protected-path list and cannot be modified by /cycle-evolve).
_comment_briefing_every_n_cycles: How often /operator-cycle auto-invokes /cycle-brief. 8 is a good starting cadence; drop to 4 for aggressive drift monitoring or raise to 12 for long-running unattended loops.
_comment_stop_after_null_streak: Diminishing-returns autostop. If the last K consecutive cycles all pass the low-value test (zero capabilities added AND no project-repo Evidence paths), the loop stops itself instead of scheduling the next wake-up. Ordering: anti-decay domain switch fires at 3 nulls; this gate fires at K=5, only after a forced switch has already failed to break the streak.
_comment_cron_host_allowlist: Hosts that scheduled tasks may reach without per-task declaration. Add per-task hosts at /schedule-task register-time; anything outside this list + the task's declared allowlist is rejected.
_comment_goal: Goal mode. When active=true, the /operator-cycle Pre-cycle step 0.5 reads GOAL.md and overrides the domain to goal_ship on every non-free cycle. free_cycle_modulo=3 means every 3rd cycle is a free rotation instead of a goal cycle; raise to run more free cycles between goal pushes.
